text: Are there any failure modes of Chiller 6 that can be predicted by monitoring the vibration sensor data?

tasks.task_description: Detect Chiller 6 failure using sensor data.
tasks.agent_name: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
tasks.final_answer: Compressor Overheating, Heat Exchangers: Fans, Evaporator Water side fouling, Condenser Water side fouling, Condenser Improper water side flow rate
tasks.review: Task Status: Partially Accomplished | identified failure modes | ensure access to sensor data, state limitations, explain assumptions
